Fudge MCP

## Fudge MCP

Launching today

## Give your AI agents design taste from existing websites

116 followers

## Give your AI agents design taste from existing websites

116 followers

Visit website

Search

Meet Fudge: a design reference engine for AI agents. Instead of asking AI to make another “modern, premium” interface from scratch, let it search nearly 10,000 real websites by fonts, colors, components, layouts, page types, and visual similarity. Fudge combines measured design evidence with screenshots, runs locally through MCP, and remembers references you save with its Chrome extension. Give your coding agent better taste and not more adjectives.

### Top forum threads [...] 🔥 Our Take: Your trackpad has had a haptic engine since 2015, and in ten years its only job has been faking the feel of a click. Breva is the first app we've seen use it for something human: the Mac physically breathes under your finger. Meditation apps live on your phone, the same device serving you the stress. Putting the two-minute reset inside the machine you work on, one keystroke from whatever spiked your heart rate, is the right placement. One commenter said it feels "like the mac itself is breathing with you." That's the whole product, and it's enough.

164 [...] So we teamed up with OpenAI to put credits behind it. Build something with Sol, Terra, or Luna, schedule your launch for Thursday, July 23, and the top products walk away with $10k in OpenAI credits.

If you're going to kick the tires anyway, might as well get paid for it. You've got nine days: schedule your launch for July 23.

## Cards that die on purpose

Agentcard gives your AI agent its own debit card: fund a wallet, set a budget, and it issues single-use cards that close themselves the moment a charge clears. Karen Serfaty (@keyserfaty) was running Atlas when Remote acquired it, then turned down a job at Stripe to build this instead.
